name: Bacon-Wrapped Little Loaves
recipeIngredient: 6 Thin Slices of Bacon (cut in half)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except the bacon.
3. Shape the mixture into six small loaves.
4. Crisscross two of the half slices of bacon across each loaf, tucking the ends under.
5. Place the loaves on a rack in a shallow baking pan and bake uncovered for 50 minutes.
6. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
